case.title: WIESE v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h1: WIESE v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE, 304 U.S. 562 (1938)
opinion.h2: Harry E. WIESE, petitioner, v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE.* No. 886.
Supreme Court of the Unied States
opinion.p: Mr. H. Kennedy McCook, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 304 U.S. 589, 58 S. Ct. 1045, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Wiese v. Commissioner of Internal Revenue 304 U.S. 562 (1938) ]
